name: Vega
description: Photostable green eFRET GEVI built by inserting mBaoJin(3M) into the first extracellular loop of Ace2 rhodopsin, with Kv2.1 and ER2 targeting motifs for long-duration one-photon voltage imaging.

kinetics.note: Double-exponential fit to +100 mV command steps (-70 mV to +30 mV) in HEK293T cells

dynamicRangeData.note: ΔF/F0 per 100 mV in HEK293T cells at 1058 Hz under 488 nm illumination at 3 W/cm²

sensitivityData.note: Absolute ΔF/F0 per AP in cultured rat hippocampal neurons at 484 Hz under 488 nm illumination at 3 W/cm²

brightnessData.note: Whole-cell fluorescence in HEK293T cells under 488 nm illumination at 3 W/cm²
Whole-cell fluorescence in HEK293T cells under 488 nm illumination at 3 W/cm²

photostabilityData.note: Photobleaching quarter-life t0.75 in live HEK293T cells under 488 nm illumination

researchPapers.title: A photostable genetically encoded voltage indicator for imaging neural activities in tissue and live animals
researchPapers.authors: Cao C, Zhu R, Zhou S, Zhao Z, Lin C, Liu S, Peng L, Subach FV, Piatkevich KD, Zou P
researchPapers.sample: HEK293T cells; Rat, hippocampal neurons, in vitro; Mouse, thalamic acute brain slices, ex vivo; Mouse, pancreatic islets, ex vivo; Mouse, visual cortex, in vivo
